label: The Prismhush Grotto
description: The Prismhush Grotto is a hollowed chamber within Kharion Caustic Spire, where lattice-cut fractures open into a faceted void that absorbs rather than reflects the meridian glare. Its walls consist of razor-planed glass sheets stitched by dark crystalline ribs, forming rectilinear vaults aligned to the spire’s rigid angles. Fixed caustic bands enter through slit-like fissures and break into disciplined planes of illumination that terminate abruptly in intervals of absolute shadow. The floor is a tessellation of sharp-edged shards fused into stable polygons, preserving the spire’s geometric order underfoot.
